carrier: Zurich Insurance Europe AG, Belgian branch
conclusion: Underwriter is Zurich Insurance Europe AG, Belgian branch. Trust: AMD Global Trust (Cayman Islands). Plan Administrator: Trawick International. Claims: SureGo (mysurego.com).
section: SUBSCRIPTION AGREEMENT / PLAN ADMINISTRATOR
exact_language: insurance coverage extended by Zurich Insurance Europe AG, Belgian branch (the "Insurer") to Covered Persons under the Trust... PLAN ADMINISTRATOR: Trawick International

carrier: Zurich Insurance Europe AG, Belgian branch
section: SCHEDULE OF BENEFITS — BENEFIT SUMMARY

carrier: Zurich Insurance Europe AG, Belgian branch
conclusion: Deductible options: $0, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, $2,500, or $5,000 per Period of Insurance. Includes $50 option not available in most competitor plans.
section: SCHEDULE OF BENEFITS — BENEFIT SUMMARY
exact_language: DEDUCTIBLE PER PERIOD OF INSURANCE $0, $50, $100, $250, $500, $1,000, $2,500, $5,000

carrier: Zurich Insurance Europe AG, Belgian branch
conclusion: Plan pays 100% up to Medical Maximum — NO in-network vs out-of-network split. No PPO penalty. Urgent Care $30 copay.
section: SCHEDULE OF BENEFITS — BENEFIT SUMMARY
exact_language: CO-INSURANCE PER PERIOD OF INSURANCE 100% up to the Medical Maximum / URGENT CARE CO-PAY $30 per Incident if the $0 deductible is chosen, there is no Co-Pay
flag: NEEDS MANUAL REVIEW — No explicit PPO network mentioned. Verify if any network repricing applies. No in-network/out-of-network differential means no discount negotiation benefit.

carrier: Zurich Insurance Europe AG, Belgian branch
conclusion: Available to non-US citizens residing outside USA traveling to visit USA (or USA + other countries). Must arrive in USA before traveling elsewhere. Coverage outside USA and Home Country: max 30 days. Not available age 90+. Cannot have resided in USA >365 days prior to Effective Date.
section: GENERAL TERMS OF COVERAGE — ELIGIBILITY
exact_language: This Certificate of Coverage provides coverage to non-US citizens who reside outside the USA and are traveling outside of Their Home Country to visit solely the United States... This Certificate of Coverage is not available to any individual who has been residing within the United States for more than 365 days prior to their Effective Date or who is considered a Habitual Resident of the country or jurisdiction in which care is received.

carrier: Zurich Insurance Europe AG, Belgian branch
conclusion: Pre-existing conditions excluded. 3-year lookback period.
section: DEFINITIONS — Pre-Existing Condition
exact_language: "Pre-Existing Condition" means any Injury, Illness, sickness, disease, or other physical, medical, Mental or Nervous Disorder, condition or ailment that, with reasonable medical certainty, existed at the time of Application or at any time during the three (3) years prior to the Effective Date of this insurance, whether or not previously manifested, symptomatic or known, diagnosed, Treated, or disclosed to the Company

carrier: Zurich Insurance Europe AG, Belgian branch
benefit: Acute Onset of Pre-existing Conditions — Age ≤69
conclusion: Age ≤69: Acute Onset covered up to full Medical Maximum. Cardiac conditions and stroke are covered under the $25,000 sub-limit.
section: SCHEDULE OF BENEFITS — ACUTE ONSET OF A PRE-EXISTING CONDITION
exact_language: ACUTE ONSET OF A PRE-EXISTING CONDITION For ages up to and including 69 the limit is up to the Medical Policy Maximum purchased per Period of Insurance

carrier: Zurich Insurance Europe AG, Belgian branch
benefit: Acute Onset of Pre-existing Conditions — Age 70–79 and 80+
conclusion: Age 70+: Acute Onset maximum reduced to $35,000. Age 80+: reduced to $20,000.
section: SCHEDULE OF BENEFITS — ACUTE ONSET OF A PRE-EXISTING CONDITION
exact_language: Upon attending age 70 Acute Onset benefit will be reduced to a Maximum of $35,000 / Upon attending age 80 the benefit will be reduced to $20,000

carrier: Zurich Insurance Europe AG, Belgian branch
conclusion: Cardiac conditions (coronary disease, hypertension, hyperlipidemia, CHF, arrhythmias, cardiomyopathy, valvular/congenital/rheumatic heart disease, heart attack, MI) and stroke capped at $25,000 (age ≤69) or $15,000 (age 70+).
section: SCHEDULE OF BENEFITS — CARDIAC CONDITIONS AND STROKE EXPENSES
exact_language: CARDIAC CONDITIONS AND STROKE EXPENSES Up to $25,000 per Period of Insurance for ages up to 69 or $15,000 per Period of Insurance for ages 70 and over

carrier: Zurich Insurance Europe AG, Belgian branch
conclusion: Conditions: Treatment within 24 hours of outbreak; not traveling against medical advice; not traveling to seek treatment; not in modified treatment program; pre-existing condition stabilized ≥30 days prior to Effective Date; must be outside Habitual Country. Note: uses 'Habitual Country' not 'Country of Residence'.
section: ACUTE ONSET OF A PRE-EXISTING CONDITION — Conditions and Restrictions
exact_language: (a) Treatment must be obtained within twenty-four (24) hours of the sudden and Unexpected outbreak or reoccurrence. ... (e) the Pre-existing Condition must have been stabilized for at least thirty (30) days prior to the Effective Date without change in Treatment. (f) the Covered Person must be traveling outside their Habitual Country.

carrier: Zurich Insurance Europe AG, Belgian branch
conclusion: ER for Injury or Illness with direct hospital admission: covered. ER for Illness WITHOUT direct hospital admission: $200 additional deductible per visit (slightly lower than Patriot America Plus's $250).
section: SCHEDULE OF BENEFITS — EMERGENCY ROOM
exact_language: EMERGENCY ROOM SICKNESS WITH NO DIRECT HOSPITAL ADMISSION $200 Additional deductible per visit – Only applies when receiving care in an Emergency Room for a Sickness that does not result in a Hospital admittance / EMERGENCY ROOM INJURY/ACCIDENT OR SICKNESS WITH DIRECT HOSPITAL ADMISSION Covered

carrier: Zurich Insurance Europe AG, Belgian branch
conclusion: Hospital Room and Board: average semi-private room rate. ICU: 3 times the average semi-private room rate (unusual structure — not a flat dollar amount per day).
section: SCHEDULE OF BENEFITS — HOSPITAL ROOM AND BOARD / ICU
exact_language: HOSPITAL ROOM AND BOARD EXPENSES The average semi-private room rate / HOSPITAL INTENSIVE CARE UNIT EXPENSES 3 times the average semi-private room rate

carrier: Zurich Insurance Europe AG, Belgian branch
conclusion: Surgery covered at 100% (Physician's Surgical Treatment Expenses: Covered). No dollar cap per surgery.
section: SCHEDULE OF BENEFITS — PHYSICIAN'S SURGICAL TREATMENT EXPENSES
exact_language: PHYSICIAN'S SURGICAL TREATMENT EXPENSES Covered

carrier: Zurich Insurance Europe AG, Belgian branch
conclusion: Physical Therapy: $50 per visit, 1 visit per day, 10 visits maximum per Period of Insurance. Must be prescribed by a Physician. SIGNIFICANTLY MORE LIMITED than Patriot America Plus (which has no session cap).
section: SCHEDULE OF BENEFITS — PHYSIOTHERAPY, PHYSICAL MEDICINE, CHIROPRACTIC EXPENSES
exact_language: PHYSIOTHERAPY, PHYSICAL MEDICINE, CHIROPRACTIC EXPENSES Limited to $50 per visit, one visit per day and 10 visits per Period of Insurance (must be prescribed by a Physician)

carrier: Zurich Insurance Europe AG, Belgian branch
conclusion: Prescriptions covered. If plan max ≤$250K: up to full plan max. If plan max is $500K or $1M: capped at $250,000 per Period of Insurance. 90-day maximum supply.
section: SCHEDULE OF BENEFITS — PRESCRIPTION DRUGS AND MEDICATIONS EXPENSES
exact_language: PRESCRIPTION DRUGS AND MEDICATIONS EXPENSES If your Maximum Limit is $10,000, $20,000, $50,000, $100,000, or $250,000 the limit is up to the plan Maximum per Period of Insurance. If your Maximum Limit is $500,000 or $1,000,000, the Limit is up to $250,000 per Period of Insurance

carrier: Zurich Insurance Europe AG, Belgian branch
conclusion: COVID-19, SARS-CoV-2, and any mutation covered up to plan maximum. No 30-day waiting requirement (unlike CoverAmerica Gold).
section: SCHEDULE OF BENEFITS — COVID-19
exact_language: COVID-19, SARS-CoV-2 MEDICAL EXPENSES Medically Necessary Treatment for COVID-19, SARS-CoV-2, and any mutation or variation of SARS-CoV-2 up to the maximum as stated in the Schedule of Benefits

carrier: Zurich Insurance Europe AG, Belgian branch
conclusion: Well Doctor Visit (preventive): $125, one visit per Period of Insurance. Must occur within first 21 days from Effective Date AND requires at least 30 days coverage purchased. Telemedicine NOT eligible.
section: SCHEDULE OF BENEFITS — WELL DOCTOR VISIT EXPENSES
exact_language: WELL DOCTOR VISIT EXPENSES Up to $125 - One Visit per Period of Insurance

carrier: Zurich Insurance Europe AG, Belgian branch
conclusion: Emergency Medical Evacuation: 100% up to $1,000,000. Acute Onset of Pre-existing Condition evacuation: up to $25,000.
section: SCHEDULE OF BENEFITS — EMERGENCY MEDICAL EVACUATION
exact_language: EMERGENCY MEDICAL EVACUATION* 100% up to $1,000,000 per Period of Insurance / Limit of $25,000 Maximum per Period of Insurance for any condition covered under Acute Onset of a Pre-existing Condition Benefit

carrier: Zurich Insurance Europe AG, Belgian branch
conclusion: Extension allowed minimum 5 days, maximum 364 days total Period of Insurance. No grace period. If coverage lapses, reapplication restarts the pre-existing condition exclusion.
section: OPTIONAL EXTENSION PROCEDURES
exact_language: an extension period can be purchased... for a minimum of 5 days; 3. for up to a maximum of 364 days, provided the Covered Person's Period of Insurance does not exceed 364 days in total.

carrier: Zurich Insurance Europe AG, Belgian branch
conclusion: Mental and Nervous Disorder treatment: $2,500 per Period of Insurance.
section: SCHEDULE OF BENEFITS — MENTAL OR NERVOUS DISORDER TREATMENT EXPENSES
exact_language: MENTAL OR NERVOUS DISORDER TREATMENT EXPENSES $2,500 per Period of Insurance

carrier: Zurich Insurance Europe AG, Belgian branch
conclusion: Telemedicine service included as a non-insurance service. Not part of the insurance underwritten by Zurich.
section: SCHEDULE OF BENEFITS — ADDITIONAL SERVICES
exact_language: **Telemedicine https://trawickinternational.com/telemedicine / ** This is a non-insurance service and is not a part of the insurance underwritten by Zurich Insurance Europe AG Belgian branch.
